role: This file is the stylesheet that positions the surface navigation host in the shell and styles the plain fallback nav chips shown before DNA's navRail renders.
capabilities: Fixed left-edge vertical rail placement centered vertically in the viewport
Responsive left inset adjustment at 1024px breakpoint
Progressive-enhancement visibility switch that hides the fallback once DNA's navRail has rendered
Fallback nav layout as a vertical flex column of pill-shaped chips
Fallback chip typography, color, background, border, sizing, and blur backdrop styling
Hover and focus-visible visual feedback on fallback chips
substance_why: The file implements concrete layout, responsive behavior, a degrade-clean fallback mechanism, and complete fallback item styling with no TODOs or empty stubs.
interactions_present: Hover feedback on fallback nav items
Focus-visible outline on fallback nav items
interactions_missing: No selected/current nav item state styling
No keyboard activation or ARIA-current indicators
performance_risks: backdrop-filter: blur(6px) on every fallback chip can be GPU/compositing-heavy
overflow:auto on a fixed-position rail may cause scroll/layout recalculation
reuse_why: Keep the spatial host role and degrade-clean fallback pattern, but revise the DNA coupling, token usage, and visual styling for the redesigned surface.
decomposition_hints: Split host positioning rules (.surface-nav) from fallback chip styling (.surface-nav-fallback, .surface-nav-item)
Move the DNA render-state selector (.surface-nav-dna:not(:empty) + .surface-nav-fallback) next to component integration logic
Separate responsive breakpoint rules into a layout-specific partial
